title: Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Assistant and Field Investigators Posts
shortInfo: Sri Venkateswara College Delhi has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 4 Research Assistant and Field Investigators Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

basic_details.job_title: Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Assistant and Field Investigators Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sri Venkateswara College Delhi has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 4 Research Assistant and Field Investigators Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D./M.Phil./Post graduate in social science discipline with minimum 55% marks.
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Ph.D./M.Phil./Post graduate in social science discipline with minimum 55% marks. Field Investigators: Post graduate in any social science discipline with minimum 55% marks.

salary_details.pay_scale: Research Assistant: ₹37,000/- per month (Consolidated); Field Investigators: ₹20,000/- per month (Consolidated)
salary_details.details: Research Assistant: ₹37,000/- per month (Consolidated) Field Investigators: ₹20,000/- per month (Consolidated)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Sri Venkateswara College Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Research Assistant and Field Investigators posts is 09 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Assistant and Field Investigators?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced by Sri Venkateswara College Delhi for the positions of Research Assistant and Field Investigators. This includes 1 Research Assistant and 3 Field Investigators.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: For Research Assistant, a Ph.D./M.Phil./Post graduate in a social science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks is required. For Field Investigators, a Post graduate degree in any social science discipline with at least 55% marks is necessary.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Research Assistant and Field Investigators?
faq.answer: The selected Research Assistant will receive a consolidated salary of ₹37,000/- per month. Field Investigators will be paid a consolidated salary of ₹20,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Recruitment 2026 is entirely online. Candidates need to fill out the provided Google form to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Recruitment 2026. Candidates can proceed with their application without any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Assistant and Field Investigators positions at Sri Venkateswara College Delhi will be based on an interview. Candidates who are shortlisted will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Sri Venkateswara College Delhi located?
faq.answer: Sri Venkateswara College Delhi is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110021. This is a project-based recruitment under the University of Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for these positions?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any geographical restrictions for applicants. However, candidates should ensure they meet the eligibility criteria and are available for the interview process if shortlisted.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is usually provided in the "Important Links" section of the job advertisement. Candidates are strongly advised to download and read the PDF for complete details before applying.
